description: Deliver persistent notification center with read-state controls and filtering.

userStories.title: Persist per-user notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification read state stored per account so that read and unread changes persist across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Database stores per-user notification read state with notification id and updated timestamp
Read state defaults to unread when no record exists
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend query for notification list and unread count
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification feed data including unread count so that the UI can render notification list and unread badge accurately.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification query returns notifications with read state for current user
Response includes unread count derived from persisted read state
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend action to mark notification read or unread
userStories.description: As a user, I want to toggle notification read state so that I can manage which items still need attention.
acceptanceCriteria: Endpoint accepts notification id and read boolean for current user
Read-state updates persist and return updated unread count
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show unread badge and open notification list UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want unread badge and notification list panel so that I can discover and review new notifications quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation header shows unread badge count from notification query
Clicking notification trigger opens notification list panel with items sorted newest first
List rows display read or unread visual state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add notification list filter by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread items or review completed ones.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification panel includes filter options All, Unread, and Read
Selecting filter updates visible rows without closing panel
Filter interactions keep unread badge count consistent with backend state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add backend action to clear all read notifications for user
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications from my list so that old completed items stop cluttering notification center.
acceptanceCriteria: Endpoint removes or archives read notifications for current user only
Unread notifications remain available after clear action
Response returns refreshed unread count and remaining notifications
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add clear-read control to notification center UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want clear-read control in notification panel so that I can remove read notifications from visible list.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification panel shows Clear read action when read notifications exist
Clicking Clear read calls backend clear-read action and refreshes list state
After clear action, read notifications are removed from visible list and badge count updates
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
